_description: Design tokens for the decorative-images pattern. The accessibility fix is entirely in HTML attributes (alt=''), not color choices. These tokens document the page palette used in before/ and after/.

banner-fill.usage: Decorative hero banner fill — this element has alt='' and is exempt from contrast requirements
banner-fill.note: WCAG 1.4.11 (Non-text Contrast) exempts purely decorative elements. Because this image has alt='', it is not part of the UI and has no contrast requirement.

divider-fill.usage: Decorative wave divider fill — has alt=''

ornament-stroke-inner.usage: Decorative ornament inner ring stroke — has alt=''

photo-placeholder.usage: Placeholder background for the informative article photo

photo-placeholder-inner.usage: Inner placeholder shape for the article photo illustration
